screen_result.custody_state: completed_and_retrieved; this selection binds the result digest, not an untracked path

selection_rule_applied: The completed selection-only screen nominated the exact six-cell connected region above. Validation must evaluate all six cells; none may be removed or added after seeing validation results.

inference.estimand: Within each cell, mean rowwise maximum canonical ReT over all 256 calendars minus canonical ReT of the best tape-independent calendar selected on the same validation tapes.
inference.static_reselection: For every paired tape bootstrap resample and every cell, reselect the calendar with the greatest resampled mean; break an exact tie by smallest calendar index.
inference.simultaneous_lcb: Basic max-error one-sided familywise 95% bound across the six frozen cells: for resample b and cell c compute e_bc=theta_hat_c-theta_star_bc; q95 is the empirical 0.95 quantile of max_c(e_bc) using NumPy method=higher; LCB_c=theta_hat_c-q95.
inference.connected_region_rule: Filter cells with simultaneous LCB >= 0.01. On the original frozen adjacency graph, retain connected components with at least three cells spanning at least two hazard levels and at least two duration levels.
inference.cell_selection_rule: Among cells in passing connected components, select the smallest observed H_PI; break an exact tie by cell_id.
